name: pgm-meta-ads
description: Read-only Meta Ads reporting tools for Point Guard Media

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Meta Ads with read-only reporting tools.
interface.longDescription: PGM Meta Ads connects Codex to Meta's Marketing API for account, campaign, creative, and demographic reporting without write access.
defaultPrompt: Compare account performance for the last three months.
Rank qualified creatives from the last 30 days.
